User Story Description: As a farmer, I want to enter soil nutrients (N, P, K), soil pH, rainfall, temperature, and humidity so that the system can analyze my land conditions.
Acceptance Criteria: Given valid soil and climate values, when the user submits the form, then the system should accept the input successfully.

User Story Description: As a user, I want the system to validate soil and climate inputs so that incorrect or unrealistic values do not affect predictions.
Acceptance Criteria: Given invalid or missing values, when the form is submitted, then the system should display appropriate validation errors.

User Story Description: As a system, I want to use a trained Random Forest model to predict the most suitable crop based on input parameters.
Acceptance Criteria: Given valid inputs, when prediction is triggered, then the system should return a crop recommendation.

User Story Description: As a farmer, I want to see the predicted crop clearly displayed so that I can easily understand the recommendation.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a successful prediction, when the result page loads, then the predicted crop name should be visible.

User Story Description: As a user, I want the system to handle errors gracefully so that I am informed when prediction fails.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a system or model failure, when prediction is requested, then a clear error message should be shown.

User Story Description: As a user, I want to modify input values and rerun predictions so that I can compare crop suitability.
Acceptance Criteria: Given updated input values, when prediction is re-run, then the system should generate a new result.

User Story Description: As a developer, I want to test each feature after every sprint so that defects are identified early.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a completed sprint feature, when testing is performed, then the feature should meet acceptance criteria.

User Story Description: As a user, I want the interface to be simple and user-friendly so that non-technical users can use the system easily.
Acceptance Criteria: Given the application interface, when a new user accesses it, then input and output should be easy to understand.

User Story Description: As an agricultural researcher, I want consistent predictions for similar inputs so that results are reliable.
Acceptance Criteria: Given similar input values, when predictions are run multiple times, then results should remain consistent.

User Story Description: As a product owner, I want the system to be scalable so that future features can be added in later sprints.
Acceptance Criteria: Given the current architecture, when new features are planned, then the system should support extension.
